pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade the Jakarta EE API dependency from version 9 to 10 to support the new Java version.
Upgrade the MicroProfile specification version from 5.0 to 6.1 to match the new Jakarta EE level.
Upgrade the Payara Micro application server to a version compatible with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 10.
Upgrade the Payara Micro Maven plugin to version 2.0 to support the new server version and build process.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to support the target Java version.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from a JRE 17 Alpine variant to a JRE 21 Alpine variant to run the application on Java 21.
